name: v1.1.6 voice-runtime upgrade hotfix
summary: Patch hotfix for a single upgrade-path defect: voice runtime silently failed to refresh on upgrade/update all with 'Warning: ... unsafe archive path "./"' — latent on every upgrade since v1.1.0, surfaced by an operator on the 1.1.4->1.1.5 upgrade. The voice-piper archive carries a './' root entry (the conventional first tar record); extractTarGz pre-skipped it but the two voice extractors (extractVoiceRuntimeTarGz, extractVoiceRuntimeZip) passed it into the shared safeArchiveTarget, which rejected '.' as unsafe — one extract loop diverged. SYSTEMIC FIX: the archive-root rule now lives once in safeArchiveTarget (reports the harmless root entry as skip; still rejects absolute/'..'/prefix-escape); all three extract loops consume the single rule and extractTarGz's divergent special-case is removed, so the inconsistency that caused the bug cannot recur. TDD RED (TestExtractVoiceRuntimeTarGz_RootEntry failed with the exact production error) -> GREEN; traversal-rejection tests unchanged; cmd/updatecmd green under -race; build green. No agent-runtime surface touched (cmd/updatecmd CLI only), so no behavioral soak is applicable (justified). The self-update domain unification into a testable src/update.Updater (merging the extract loops) remains tracked for v1.2.0. SHIPPED (2026-06-14): promoted via PR #124 (develop->main, merge f7bdc362), tag v1.1.6; release workflow green, CI tree-reuse fired (4th consecutive release; Pre-release Validation reused develop CI for tree 3a176c26); published live — clean 1.1.6 binary, SHA256SUMS present, /releases/latest resolves v1.1.6 (prerelease=false), site release-sync dispatched. END-TO-END proof: the published voice-piper bundle's first tar entry is './' (the exact root that failed) and the fixed code extracts it (TDD RED->GREEN on that exact error). No behavioral soak applicable (CLI upgrade path only; agent runtime byte-identical to v1.1.5).
updateSource: Hotfix branched from develop (v1.1.5); operator-surfaced on the 1.1.4->1.1.5 upgrade; promoted via #124 and tag v1.1.6 shipped 2026-06-14

workstreams.name: Voice-runtime archive-root extraction fix
workstreams.summary: Unify the archive-root entry rule in safeArchiveTarget so all three extract loops handle the './' root consistently.

evidence.label: TestExtractVoiceRuntimeTarGz_RootEntry RED (unsafe archive path "./") -> GREEN; traversal-rejection + product-knowledge-root tests unchanged; cmd/updatecmd green under -race

required.title: Voice runtime refreshes on upgrade (archive './' root entry no longer rejected)
required.summary: safeArchiveTarget reports the harmless archive root entry ('.'/'./') as a skip instead of rejecting it as unsafe; all three extract loops (skills/product-knowledge extractTarGz, voice tar, voice zip) consume the single rule and extractTarGz's divergent special-case is removed. Voice-runtime refresh works again on every platform; path-traversal rejection unchanged.
